title: nf-core/spatialxenium pipeline parameters
description: Pipeline to process spatial transcriptomics data for the Xenium Platform

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Path to comma-separated file containing information about the samples in the experiment.
input.help_text: You will need to create a design file with information about the samples in your experiment before running the pipeline. Use this parameter to specify its location. It must be a comma-separated file with 3 columns (and a header).

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved. You have to use absolute paths to storage on Cloud infrastructure.

multiqc_title.description: MultiQC report title. Printed as page header, used for filename if not otherwise specified.

institutional_config_options.title: Institutional config options
institutional_config_options.description: Parameters used to describe centralised config profiles. These should not be edited.

custom_config_version.description: Git commit id for Institutional configs.

generic_options.title: Generic options
generic_options.description: Less common options for the pipeline, typically set in a config file.

publish_dir_mode.description: Method used to save pipeline results to output directory.

email_on_fail.description: Email address for completion summary, only when pipeline fails.

plaintext_email.description: Send plain-text email instead of HTML.

max_multiqc_email_size.description: File size limit when attaching MultiQC reports to summary emails.

monochrome_logs.description: Do not use coloured log outputs.

hook_url.description: Incoming hook URL for messaging service

multiqc_config.description: Custom config file to supply to MultiQC.

multiqc_logo.description: Custom logo file to supply to MultiQC. File name must also be set in the MultiQC config file.

multiqc_methods_description.description: Custom MultiQC yaml file containing HTML including a methods description.

validate_params.description: Boolean whether to validate parameters against the schema at runtime.

pipelines_testdata_base_path.description: Base URL or local path to location of pipeline test dataset files.

analysis_options.title: Analysis parameters
analysis_options.description: Parameters to customize the pipeline's analysis behavior.

genes.description: Path to the file containing the list of genes to be used in the analysis.

min_reads_per_cell.description: Minimum read count filter to remove low expressing cells.

max_reads_per_cell.description: Maximum read count filter to remove high expressing cells.

max_control_prop_per_cell.description: Maximum proportion of control probes (or control codewords) per cell.

n_highly_var_genes.description: Number of highly variable genes to select in the Seurat `FindVariableFeatures` step.

reference_rds.description: Path to RDS object of single-cell RNA-seq data for cell label transfer. If not provided, no label transfer is performed.

single_cell_label_col.description: Column in the single-cell RDS to use for label transfer.

min_celltype_probability.description: Minimum probability for cell type assignment during label transfer.

generic_name.description: Use a generic name for the Xenium_Seurat_Object.rds file.

future_mem_limit.description: Max memory (in bytes) for R's `future` package, e.g., 8e9 = 8GB.

validationFailUnrecognisedParams.description: Allow or disallow unrecognised parameters in pipeline. If false, unrecognised params raise only a warning.

max_memory.description: Maximum memory available to Nextflow, e.g. '512.GB'.

max_cpus.description: Maximum CPU cores available to Nextflow.

max_time.description: Maximum time limit for pipeline processes, e.g. '240.h'.

genomes.description: Ignore reference genome param (not used in this pipeline). Added to avoid warnings when set externally.
